name: TRUST-ESD: A Risk-Calibrated and Governance-Aware AI Framework for Enterprise Strategic Decision Support Under Uncertainty

description: arXiv:2607.20065v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Enterprise strategic decision support requires AI systems that are not only accurate, but also uncertainty-aware, risk-calibrated, explainable, and governance-compliant. This paper proposes TRUST-ESD, a risk-calibrated and governance-aware framework for enterprise decision support under uncertainty. TRUST-ESD evaluates feasible counterfactual stra...
author: Tian Qiu, Li Yan, Mahabubur Rahman Miraj, Shanqin Yi, Md Intekhab Rahman Galib, Jahid Hasan
